subject: [PATCH pynfs v2 02/25] nfs4.1: add a getfh() to the end of create_obj() compound

2026-04-16.patch_summary: This patch adds a GETFH operation to the end of the create_obj() compound in the NFSv4.1 server, allowing for the retrieval of the filehandle of newly created objects. This is necessary because some tests require knowledge of the filehandle of the created object. The change affects the environment.py file in the server41tests directory.
